  "findings": [
    "Shackle is side-loaded, which significantly reduces its rated working load limit (WLL) and risks catastrophic failure."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the lift immediately.",
    "Adjust the rigging configuration to ensure the load is applied in-line with the shackle's centerline.",
    "Use washers or spacers on the shackle pin if necessary to center the shackle, or transition to a master link/spreader bar."
  ],
  "rationale": "Side-loading a standard shackle drastically reduces its rated capacity (up to 50% at a 45-degree angle, and it is not permitted at 90 degrees without specialized hardware). This creates an immediate high-risk safety hazard during an active lift.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B30.26",
    "OSHA 1926.251"
  ]
}
